Subject: CAPACITY POSTING - TIM for March 25, 2026
Author: Tom Koontz
Notice Text
COLUMBIA GULF TRANSMISSION, LLC DAILY CAPACITY POSTING
 
Columbia Gulf Transmission LLC (CGT) posts projections of anticipated restrictions at least 24 hours prior to the time when nominations are due. These advance forecasts are subject to change based on actual operating conditions. Customers should submit nominations for Timely Cycle to determine whether the service is available under current conditions.
 
============================================================================
============================================================================
 
FORCE MAJEURE / OFO
 
No Force Majeure is necessary.
 
No Operational Flow Order (OFO) is necessary.
 
 
============================================================================
============================================================================
 
Customers are encouraged to monitor scheduled volumes on the Operationally Available Capacity (OAC) screen on Navigates Informational Postings, as nominations may fluctuate based on market conditions.
 
============================================================================
============================================================================
 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
INTERNAL CONSTRAINTS-- Total Capacity (Net Backhaul):
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
StanSEG - Total Capacity
ClemSEG - 2,050,000
HartSEG - Total Capacity
HampSEG - Total Capacity
CorinSEG - 2,325,000
BannSEG - Total Capacity
InvrnSEG - Total Capacity
ShelSEG - Total Capacity
DelhiSEG - Total Capacity
* AlexSEG - * Total Capacity (effective Intraday-1 Cycle, 3-24-26)
RayneSEG - Total Capacity
WLSEG - Total Capacity
ELSEG - Total Capacity
EL300SEG - Total Capacity
HoumaSEG - Total Capacity
 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
INTERNAL CONSTRAINTS-- Total Capacity (Net Forwardhaul):
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
StanSEG - Total Capacity
ClemSEG - Total Capacity
HartSEG - Total Capacity
HampSEG - Total Capacity
CorinSEG - Total Capacity
BannSEG - Total Capacity
InvrnSEG - Total Capacity
ShelSEG - Total Capacity
DelhiSEG - Total Capacity
AlexSEG - Total Capacity
RayneSEG - Total Capacity
WLSEG - Total Capacity
ELSEG - Total Capacity
EL300SEG - Total Capacity   
HoumaSEG - Total Capacity
               
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
POINT CONSTRAINTS -- Total Capacity:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
Note: Points listed are controlled by less than meter capacity.
 
401 - CROSSTEX-GIBSON - 0
445 - TRANSCO / TERREBONNE - 0
481 - SEA ROBIN-ERATH - 0
3194 - TETCO ADAIR CO., KY (Receipts) - Total Capacity (Primary Only)
4051 - LAFAYETTE - ACADIA - Total Capacity (Primary Only)
4078 - SONAT-SHADYSIDE - Total Capacity (Primary Only)
4098 - BURLINGTON - TERREBONNE - 0
4118 - FLORIDA GAS - Total Capacity (Primary Only)
4123 - EGAN STOR-ACADIA-REC (Receipts and Deliveries) - 370,000
4137 - CLECO-TECHE - Total Capacity (Primary Only)
4186 - DISCOVERY GAS TRANSMISSION (Deliveries) - Total Capacity (Primary Only)
4203 - CENTERPOINT (Receipts) - Total Capacity (Primary Only)
4204D - GULF SOUTH DELHI Delivery - Total Capacity (Primary Only)
4208R - SOUTHEASTERN SUPPLY HEADER (SESH) - Receipt - 0
4221 - GULF CROSSING - Total Capacity (Primary Only)
4222 - Texas Gas (Isola) - 0
4315 - BROADMORE RD (Receipts) - 775,000
5112 - NORAM PERRYVILLE Delivery - Total Capacity (Primary Only)
 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
DUE PIPE AND DUE SHIPPER AVAILABILITY:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
Due Pipe - Available
Due Shipper - Not Available
 
============================================================================
============================================================================
 
PAL & IT BUSINESS
 
Representatives are available on a daily basis to discuss PAL transactions with customers who have executed master PAL service agreements.  (Reminder: Each PAL transaction including rate, term, quantity and point(s) must be provided for and approved on the Appendix A under the Master PAL Agreement). Customers who are interested in PAL transactions for next-day or longer-term park and/or lend transactions or daily discounted IT paths should contact Diana Roberts at 832-758-0900 (ICE droberts6) for more information.   
 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
AUTO PAL AVAILABILITY:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
Effective with EVENING Cycle for each Gas Day, Auto Parks/Loans will be limited to  +/- 5,000 Dth. Customers are reminded the intent of AutoPAL service is to utilize nominal quantities to resolve pool imbalances that result from upstream or downstream reductions during the cycle.  This service should not be used for parking or loaning large quantities.
 
AutoPAL Parks and Loan Payback - Available
AutoPAL Loans and Unparks - Available
 
* Denotes a change from previous posting.
